data.headline: Your New Chapter in Charlotte
data.body: I'm Rachel Kim — a licensed Charlotte real estate broker who specializes in helping first-time buyers, relocating families, and anyone ready for a fresh start. From the tree-lined streets of Myers Park to the creative energy of NoDa, I'll help you find the neighborhood that feels like home.

data.title: What I Offer
data.subtitle: Personalized guidance for every step of your journey.

items.title: First-Time Buyer Guidance
items.description: Step-by-step support from pre-approval through closing day, designed for buyers navigating the process for the first time.

items.title: Relocation Support
items.description: Neighborhood tours, school district breakdowns, and commute analysis for families moving to the Charlotte area.

items.title: Market Analysis
items.description: Detailed pricing reports using comparable sales, days-on-market trends, and neighborhood appreciation data.

items.title: Seller Marketing
items.description: Professional photography, virtual tours, and a multi-channel marketing plan to get your home sold quickly and at the right price.

items.title: Contract Negotiation
items.description: Skilled negotiation on price, repairs, and closing costs — I advocate for your best interests at every turn.

data.title: Recent Sales
data.subtitle: Helping Charlotte families find their perfect fit.

data.title: Client Reviews
data.subtitle: What past clients say about working with me.

items.text: Rachel made our first home purchase feel effortless. She explained every step, never rushed us, and found us a home we absolutely love in Dilworth. We couldn't have done it without her.
We relocated from Boston with two kids and zero knowledge of Charlotte. Rachel spent weeks showing us neighborhoods, schools, and parks. She genuinely cared about finding us the right fit.
Sold our NoDa townhome in under a week at $12K over asking. Rachel's marketing and pricing strategy were spot-on. Already recommending her to friends.

data.title: What's Your Property Worth?
data.subtitle: Get a free Charlotte market analysis in minutes.
data.description: Enter your address below and I'll send you a detailed market analysis with comparable sales, price trends, and my professional valuation. **100% free, no strings.**

data.title: About Rachel
bio: I'm Rachel Kim — a licensed real estate broker with Heartland Homes, dedicated to helping Charlotte families find where they belong. Over 10 years and 180+ transactions, I've guided first-time buyers, growing families, and relocating professionals through the biggest decision of their lives.

I believe buying a home should feel exciting, not stressful. My approach is patient, thorough, and always centered on what matters most to you — whether that's a quiet cul-de-sac near top-rated schools or a walkable bungalow in the heart of the city.
Originally from Seoul, I moved to Charlotte in 2014 and fell in love with the city's warmth, diversity, and pace of growth. This is home, and I'd love to help you make it yours.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.subheading: Your Market Analysis Is Being Prepared
thank_you.body: {firstName} will send your personalized Charlotte market report to your email shortly.
thank_you.disclaimer: This report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not an appraisal.
